description: Maps locked modules to requirement verification tests. When a locked module is changed, all mapped FR and bug regression tests are run as a verification gate. Populated by Architect per BTCAAAAA-25639 requirements traceability design.

mappings.reason: UnifiedDataManager — shared single source of truth for data ingestion, caching, and retrieval.
mappings.discovery_notes: Deterministic FR detected via Touch Index; add more as traceability registry matures.

mappings.reason: TradeRegistry — central ledger for all optimizer-produced trade records.
mappings.discovery_notes: Canary trade execution test covers TradeRegistry integrity.

mappings.reason: InstitutionalSignalEvaluator — evaluates and ranks institutional-grade signals.
mappings.discovery_notes: Signal evaluation affects trade execution covered by canary.

mappings.reason: Building block registry — dynamic discovery and registration of detector building blocks.
mappings.discovery_notes: Covered by building_blocks_registry_envoked test suite (all 82 block tests).

mappings.reason: ITM state manager — live position persistence layer for institutional trade management.
9 ORM managers under optimizer_v3/database — unified database access layer.
StrategyValidator — core validation engine for NautilusTrader-compatible strategies.
Auto-Fix Safety Framework — real-money protection layer.
UndoManager — one-level-deep undo support for auto-fix operations.
ValidationPanel — primary UI component rendering real-time validation results.
ValidationDialog — modal wrapper that embeds the ValidationPanel.
Canary trade execution test — zero-trades regression test that triggered the lock system.
mappings.discovery_notes: Self-referential: changing the canary runs the canary itself.

mappings.reason: Lock gate enforcement script — must be locked to prevent tampering.
Module lock registry — list of locked modules must itself be locked.
Lock gate exceptions — allowlist must be locked to prevent unauthorized additions.
Lock gate CI workflow — must be locked to prevent disabling the gate.

mappings.discovery_notes: No runnable tests — template-only file. Verified by manual review.
